title: HUDCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for CISO, Asset Development Specialist Posts
shortInfo: The Housing and Urban Development Corporation (HUDCO) has officially announced the Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) / Asset Development Specialist Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 20 May 2026 at the official website https://www.hudco.org.in. Candidates up to 45 years of age and holding qualifications such as Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Computer Science/IT/ITNS/IIOT/SE/MCE/MAC/System/Computer Application) or MCA or PG Degree with Computer Science/IT/System (min 60%), or Bachelor’s Degree in Civil/Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Mech

basic_details.job_title: HUDCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for CISO, Asset Development Specialist Posts
basic_details.post_name: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) / Asset Development Specialist
basic_details.short_information: The Housing and Urban Development Corporation (HUDCO) has officially announced the Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) / Asset Development Specialist Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 20 May 2026 at the official website https://www.hudco.org.in. Candidates up to 45 years of age and holding qualifications such as Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Computer Science/IT/ITNS/IIOT/SE/MCE/MAC/System/Computer Application) or MCA or PG Degree with Computer Science/IT/System (min 60%), or Bachelor’s Degree in Civil/Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Mech

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Engineering (Computer Science/IT/ITNS/IIOT/SE/MCE/MAC/System/Computer Application) or MCA or PG Degree with Computer Science/IT/System (min 60%), Bachelor’s Degree in Civil/Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Mechanical Engineering (min 60%), Desirable: MBA/2 years PG Diploma in Finance or Master’s in Construction Management/Technology
qualification.details: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO): Bachelor Degree in Engineering (full-time) in Computer Science/ IT / IT (Network and Information Security - ITNS), IT (Internet of Things - IIOT), Software Engineering (SE), Mathematics and Computing (MCE/ MAC)/ System/ Computer Application or MCA or Post Graduate Degree with Computer Science/IT/System with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA/Grade. Desirable: MBA/ 2 years PG Diploma with specialization in Finance. Asset Development Specialist: Bachelor’s Degree in the stream of Civil/ Electrical/ Electrical & Electronics/ Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA/Grade. Desirable: MBA/ 2 years PG Diploma with specialization in Finance or Master’s in Construction Management / Master’s in Construction Technology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HUDCO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HUDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the HUDCO recruitment is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this HUDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) and Asset Development Specialist in this HUDCO recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) post?
faq.answer: For the CISO post, candidates need a Bachelor Degree in Engineering (Computer Science/IT/ITNS/IIOT/SE/MCE/MAC/System/Computer Application) or MCA or a Post Graduate Degree with Computer Science/IT/System (min 60%).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these HUDCO posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both posts will receive a salary of Rs. ₹ 54,00,000 Per Annum. This is a significant remuneration package for the contractual positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these HUDCO positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this HUDCO recruitment is 45 years. Candidates should ensure they meet this age criterion as of the cut-off date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for HUDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this HUDCO recruitment is via email. Candidates need to prepare their application and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for HUDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this HUDCO recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for HUDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the HUDCO recruitment will be based on a Personal Interview. Candidates who are shortlisted will be called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the HUDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions of Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) and Asset Development Specialist is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for HUDCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for HUDCO recruitment can be found on the official website of HUDCO. A direct link to download the PDF is also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
